en.name: STM-9 Gen.2 "Competition Ghost"
en.description: The STM-9 was built for clean stages, fast splits, and shooters who care about timers. Tony cared about the smooth recoil impulse and Glock-pattern magazines. He kept the competition polish, then changed the purpose: tuned cycling, reinforced feed work, and a full-auto conversion that turns a race gun into a hallway cleaner. Competition Ghost still feels controlled in the hands, but the trophy-table manners are gone. This one left the range and learned how to haunt rooms.
